translated: With that said, let's watch Episode 7 together.
That went by so fast!
And that's it for the clip.
Actually, I really love the part after this, where everyone...
When they're all at More More House watching the commercial that actually aired, and we see Saito-san...
I love that part, and I also love seeing Minori-chan getting all pure and excited, screaming with joy.
That's all for now.
Anyway, thank you so much.
Um, I have so much I want to say, but we need to start the live show together at 10:55.
I really want to see the live show, so everyone, please keep an eye on the clock too.
I might just keep talking without noticing the time... but I really want to chat.
I think I'll talk for as long as time allows.
Where should I start?
Right.
There are a few scenes I like... Let's review some parts that weren't in the episodes we just watched.
Hagiyama-san from Rewrite, who was there, previously performed with them at the Idol Lover festival in a past event.
She's a member of a wonderful unit that met Momojan there, and it feels like they'll develop a nice rivalry going forward.
And here she is again,
appearing as Shizuku's rival while they co-star as models.
They're both stepping up their game, and I'm really looking forward to seeing what's next for those two.
Also, regarding Shizuku's past,
there were several flashback scenes. I've forgotten exactly which episodes they were in, so...
I'd love for everyone to go back and watch them, but a junior member who greeted Shizuku during her Cheerful＊Days era makes an appearance.
Back then, Shizuku was overwhelmed with work and was being produced as a "mysterious" idol.
It was a really painful time when she was pushing herself so hard. And in the middle of that,
a new junior member joined... She had worked so hard to get in because she admired her seniors.
There's a scene where she tells Shizuku directly, "That's why I'm going to do my best too."
At that moment, Shizuku... for me, I...
